tier: Solution layer — consumes Planetary Balance + Country/Company Intelligence to match technologies to identified challenges.
purpose: Evaluate technologies as solutions to identified challenges; identify WHAT TECHNOLOGIES SOLVE WHAT PROBLEMS.
no_duplicate_logic: Reads problems from Planetary Balance priority_intervention_areas + Country/Company pathways; does not re-derive.
Ingests scientific literature / tech databases via the Evidence Layer (SHOW).
Reuses the Planetary Balance lens for impact dimensions; reuses supply_chain_integrity_tracer for dependency.
Binds existing decision pathways for implementation framing.
guarantees: Deterministic Python scores 12 dimensions from cited datasets; Claude writes only validated prose.
Every dimension and match cites evidence_ids + graph nodes.
Catastrophic-tail / red-line technologies are capped and routed to expert+scholar review, never auto-recommended.
Solutions are ranked decision-support, never prescriptions; no rulings.

outputs: ranked challenge set with severity + nodes
modules.logic: Read existing problem signals from the engines below; each challenge carries its breached boundary / pathway / nodes.
Score each tech across 12 dimensions from cited datasets; SHOW-heavy; flag thin-evidence dimensions.
solution_fit = problem_severity x dimension_alignment; ranked solutions per challenge AND ranked challenges per tech.
Readiness from maturity + proven deployment scale; immature tech capped low and flagged.

outputs: environmental, water, emissions, resource, resilience impact
modules.logic: Lifecycle (not point-of-use) impact; downside screening against boundaries.
Score dependence on concentrated/contested supply + exploitation flags.

inputs: industrial base + skills data for target market
outputs: local manufacturing potential + Manufacturing Potential score
modules.logic: Can the tech be built/assembled locally (jobs, capability, value retention) vs pure import?
Score affordability for the poor, infrastructure readiness, distributional fairness of adoption.
Sequence by readiness + dependency + infrastructure; bind to decision pathways; reuse just-transition framing.
Aggregate under boundary-safety + Maqasid priority; catastrophic-tail/red-line tech cannot top-rank on benefit alone.

scoring_logic.per_dimension: 0-100 from cited datasets + data_confidence; lifecycle basis for impact dims.
scoring_logic.technology_priority_score: priority = challenge_severity x solution_fit x readiness x local_adoption_feasibility.
scoring_logic.technology_opportunity_score: opportunity = manufacturing_potential + market_gap + co_benefits (jobs, health, resilience).
scoring_logic.technology_risk_score: risk = resource_intensity + geopolitical_dependence + environmental_downside + complexity + catastrophic_tail.
scoring_logic.safety_cap: Any catastrophic-tail or red-line dimension caps priority and routes to harm_prevention_gate + scholar/expert review; cannot be auto-recommended on net benefit.
scoring_logic.what_solves_what: Per challenge: ranked technologies by priority; per technology: ranked challenges it best addresses.

TechnologyResult.disclaimer: AI-assisted, indicative, decision-support only; not engineering, investment, or policy advice; not a ruling.

explainability: Every dimension/match resolves via /explain to datasets (evidence_ids) + graph nodes; roadmap phases link to pathways; safety caps cite the harm/red-line node that triggered them.
uncertainty: Thin-evidence dimensions flagged + down-weighted; catastrophic-tail/red-line techs carry mandatory expert+scholar review and are never presented as recommended.
